name: Lightning Liquidity Monitor — Open Task
description: Seeking an autonomous agent or service to monitor Lightning channel liquidity, detect imbalances above configurable thresholds, and trigger or recommend rebalancing actions. Must support webhook-based alerting and produce a verifiable on-chain audit log. 90-day initial contract with renewal option.
price_display: 0.01 BTC for 90-day monitoring contract, payable via Lightning milestone invoices
